troparion: (Tone 3) You were struck on the face, O Christ, to save the human race;* yet You were not given over to anger;* deliver our life from the tomb, O Lord,* and grant us your salvation.
prokimenon: that the Lord is Your name.
O God, who shall be alike to You?
second_prokimenon: God, You are made known in Judah; in Israel Your name is great.
